name: YNX AI

signingClass.android: test-signed: Android Debug certificate; not production-signed
signingClass.ios: unsigned Simulator build via runnable macOS CI; no local Xcode

installEvidence.android: Current APK feca8446...501a5 installed on the task-owned API 36 emulator-5582. Package metadata, ordinary cold launch, force-stop/restart, exact callback deep link cold launch, top-resumed MainActivity, and live process were verified.
installEvidence.ios: Not installed locally: host has Command Line Tools only. .github/workflows/ynx-ai-mobile.yml performs build/install/cold launch/restart/deep link and hash on macOS.
installEvidence.web: Local process /healthz and responsive light/dark browser rendering verified; no remote staging URL.

centralIntegration.walletAuth: not integrated; exact schema-v2 entry/vector/patch supplied under apps/ai/integration; production local-auth routes fail closed by default
centralIntegration.aiGateway: not integrated; origin/main exposes GET query-prompt route while product requires POST JSON body
centralIntegration.provider: no provider-backed successful staging output evidenced; generationLive=false

knownLimitations: Canonical Wallet Auth AI registry and verifier are not merged or deployed.
Central AI Gateway POST-body stream contract is not merged or deployed.
No staging/public URL, hosted download, production signing, or store release exists.
No true provider success is claimed; current central provider evidence reports quota/rate-limit failure.
Local host lacks Xcode; iOS evidence depends on the runnable CI workflow and is not yet a successful run.
Durable screenshot coverage is incomplete; browser light/dark/mobile failure states were inspected interactively.
